title: Plugin Manifest Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating a plugin manifest file.

$schema.description: Pointer to the schema against which this document should be validated.

name.description: The unique name of the plugin, which will be used as the plugin's identifier.

version.description: The version of the plugin, following the semantic versioning spec.

displayName.description: The name of the plugin, which will be used to describe the plugin in the plugin list.

description.description: A short description of the plugin, which will be used to describe the plugin in the plugin list.

author.description: The name and optionally contact information of the person or organization that created the plugin.

license.description: The license under which the plugin is released. This should be a short name, such as 'MIT' or 'Apache-2.0'.

repository.description: URL of the repository where the source code of the plugin lives. This should be a url that points to a public git repository.

items.description: The category of the plugin, which will be used to group plugins in the plugin list.

categories.description: The categories of the plugin, which will be used to group plugins in the plugin list.

entryPoint.description: Path to the binary that will be executed when the plugin is run. This should be a relative path to the plugin directory.
